Hub Home > ecommerce-and-product > Product Photography Brief Generator

Product Photography Brief Generator

Generate a complete product photography brief for e-commerce — covering hero shots, lifestyle images, detail close-ups, scale reference shots, and platform-specific requirements. Includes AI image generation prompts for each shot type.

Beginner PASTE & GO Revenue-driving
Pro tip

Amazon requires a pure white background hero image. Etsy buyers respond to lifestyle context. Shopify stores need both. Always specify the mandatory platform requirements before the creative direction — a beautiful photo that violates platform rules gets rejected.

product photography ecommerce images photo brief amazon images lifestyle photography

Prompt Variants by Model

Claude Claude 4.x
FRESH APR 2026 
You are a product photography art director for e-commerce. Create a complete photo brief.

<product>
Product: [NAME] — [DESCRIBE WHAT IT LOOKS LIKE]
Category: [TYPE]
Key visual features: [WHAT SHOULD...

<product>
Product: [NAME] — [DESCRIBE WHAT IT LOOKS LIKE]
Category: [TYPE]
Key visual features: [WHAT SHOULD...

Unlock this prompt + all 74 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Your email unlocks all 74 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

You are a product photography art director for e-commerce. Create a complete photo brief.

<product>
Product: [NAME] — [DESCRIBE WHAT IT LOOKS LIKE]
Category: [TYPE]
Key visual features: [WHAT SHOULD BE HIGHLIGHTED — color, texture, size, detail]
Platform: [AMAZON / ETSY / SHOPIFY / ALL]
Target buyer: [WHO — what visual style appeals to them]
Competitors: [WHOSE PRODUCT PHOTOS DO YOU ADMIRE]
Budget: [PROFESSIONAL PHOTOGRAPHER / DIY / AI GENERATED]
</product>

Generate a shot list with 7 images:

**Shot 1 — Hero/Main Image:**
Platform requirements (Amazon: pure white bg, product fills 85% of frame; Etsy: can include context). Composition, angle, lighting direction. AI image prompt if applicable.

**Shot 2 — Lifestyle/In-Use:**
Product being used in a realistic setting by the target buyer. Environment, props, mood, lighting. AI prompt.

**Shot 3 — Scale Reference:**
Product next to a common object (hand, coin, everyday item) to show size. Composition notes.

**Shot 4 — Detail Close-Up:**
The feature that differentiates this product. Macro-style, focused depth of field. What to highlight.

**Shot 5 — Packaging/Unboxing:**
What the customer receives. Flat lay or hands-opening-box style. Include any included accessories.

**Shot 6 — Multiple Angles/360:**
Side, back, bottom — whatever angles show features the hero misses. Grid or carousel format.

**Shot 7 — Infographic/Comparison:**
Product with text callouts pointing to key features. OR side-by-side with competitor. Designed image, not a photograph.

For each shot: describe composition, lighting, angle, props needed, and provide an AI image generation prompt (80-100 words) if budget is AI-generated.
Notes: Claude structures comprehensive shot lists. For AI-generated images, use the prompts in Midjourney or DALL-E.

- Name: [NAME] — [DESCRIBE APPEARANCE]

Unlock this prompt + all 74 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Your email unlocks all 74 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

Act as a product photography art director. Create a 7-image photo brief.

**Product:**
- Name: [NAME] — [DESCRIBE APPEARANCE]
- Category: [TYPE]
- Highlight: [KEY VISUAL FEATURES]
- Platform: [AMAZON/ETSY/SHOPIFY/ALL]
- Buyer: [WHO]
- Photo budget: [PROFESSIONAL/DIY/AI GENERATED]

**7 shots:**
1. Hero (platform-compliant main image)
2. Lifestyle (in-use with target buyer context)
3. Scale reference (with common object for size)
4. Detail close-up (differentiating feature)
5. Packaging/unboxing
6. Multiple angles
7. Infographic/feature callouts

For each: composition, lighting, angle, props, and AI image prompt (80-100 words) if AI-generated.
Notes: Use DALL-E to generate product photos directly from the prompts. Iterate on the lifestyle shot — it is the strongest conversion driver after the hero.

I need a product photography plan for my online store.

**Product:**
- Name: [NAME] — [WHAT IT LOOKS LIKE]
- Category: [TYPE]
- What to highlight: [KEY FEATURES]
- Platform: [AMAZON/ETSY/SHOPIFY/ALL]
- Buyer: [WHO]
- Budget: [PROFESSIONAL/DIY/AI]

**Create a 7-shot brief:**
1. Hero/main image (platform rules)
2. Lifestyle/in-use shot
3. Scale reference
4. Detail close-up
5. Packaging
6. Multiple angles
7. Infographic with feature callouts

For each: composition, lighting, angle, props, and an AI image prompt if applicable.
Notes: Gemini can research top-performing product images in your category for reference.

Unlock this prompt + all 74 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Your email unlocks all 74 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

Help me plan product photos for my online store listing.

**My product:**
- Name: [NAME] — [DESCRIBE WHAT IT LOOKS LIKE]
- Category: [TYPE]
- What makes it look special: [KEY FEATURES]
- Selling on: [AMAZON/ETSY/SHOPIFY/OTHER]
- Who buys it: [TARGET BUYER]
- Photo budget: [HIRING A PHOTOGRAPHER / DOING IT MYSELF / USING AI]

**I need a plan for 7 photos:**
1. Main product photo (following platform rules)
2. Product being used by a real person in a real setting
3. Something showing how big/small it is
4. Close-up of the best feature
5. What the packaging looks like when it arrives
6. Different angles (side, back, etc.)
7. An image with text labels pointing out features

For each photo, tell me: angle, lighting, what to put near it, and if I am using AI, write me a prompt to generate it.
Notes: Copilot Designer can generate product photos from the AI prompts.
